source.title: 새학기 개학을 앞두고 학교 내 스마트기기 사용이 법률로 제한

verified_claims: Korea announced smart device restriction policy on March 6, 2026
Policy applies to K-12 schools starting new semester
Exemptions for learning purposes and assistive technology for disabled students
Health concerns: eye strain, sleep disorders, posture issues
OECD supports device-free learning environments research
France, Sweden, Australia have similar policies
fact_check.methodology: Verified through South Korean government press releases (korea.kr), OECD Digital Education Outlook 2026, and international education policy databases.

draft.headline: 한국, 학교 내 스마트기기 사용 법률로 제한…'디지털 규제' 물결 타는 교육
draft.subheadline: 3월부터 초·중등학교에서 스마트폰·태블릿 반입·사용 제한, 글로벌 흐름 속 한국의 선택
